title: Dungeons Bedwars Titles
description: Adds death + victory titles for Bedwars from Minecraft Dungeons
body:
Replaces the **victory**, **death** and **bed destroyed** titles on the screen with the Minecraft Dungeons complete level effect and death screen.

![Victory Screen!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ifggn9ho/images/423ac699c1bfaefe86f844bcc7714842afb337f6.png)

Winning or dying in bedwars becomes so much cooler with the custom graphics and sounds.
